name: Consumer Expectations Survey
description_short: ECB household survey on consumer expectations covering inflation perceptions and expectations, spending intentions, labor market views, and housing market outlook, with breakdowns by age, income, and other demographics.
use_cases: What do European households expect inflation to be in one year?
How do inflation expectations differ across income groups?
What share of households plan to make major purchases in the next year?
How has consumer confidence in labor market conditions evolved?
